query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of Magnificent 7 large acquisitions ($10B+) in 2026:

## Key Findings

**The standout pending $10B+ Mag 7 deal as of June–July 2026:**
- **Amazon → Globalstar (~$11.57 billion)** — announced April 14, 2026, at $90/share (cash + stock), pending through mid-2026. Boosts Amazon's "Leo" satellite internet vs. Starlink. Notably, Amazon is also taking over **Apple's ~20% stake** (per FCC filing ~May 27–28, 2026), with Apple continuing its iPhone Emergency SOS service.

**Completed 2026 deal:**
- **Alphabet → Wiz (~$32 billion)** — closed March 11, 2026 (announced 2025). Largest acquisition in Alphabet's history.

**Rumor that was DENIED:**
- **Nvidia → PC maker (Dell/HP)** — SemiAccurate report (~April 13, 2026) firmly denied by Nvidia. Not a real deal.

**Below threshold / blocked:**
- **Meta → Manus (~$2B)** — blocked/ordered unwound by China's NDRC on April 27, 2026.
- **Meta → Assured Robot Intelligence** — undisclosed small sum (~May 1, 2026).

**Not acquisitions (but $10B+ transactions):** A ~$10B Meta–Google Cloud *commercial* deal; Alphabet's ~$84.75B equity raise + $10B Berkshire placement.

**Big picture:** Mag 7 capital in 2026 flowed overwhelmingly into AI capex (~$650–725B combined) rather than large M&A, partly due to antitrust scrutiny. Beyond the ongoing Amazon–Globalstar process, no other confirmed Mag 7 acquisition ≥$10B was newly announced or credibly rumored specifically in June–July 2026.

sources.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said Tuesday it would acquire Globalstar for $90 a share, in a deal worth about $11.57 billion.

sources.title: Amazon to acquire Globalstar for $11.57 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said it will acquire Globalstar for $90 per share in a deal valued at about $11.57 billion; partnership with Apple; targeting early 2028 for direct-to-device launch.

sources.title: Amazon to Acquire Apple's Globalstar Stake in Satellite Deal
sources.snippet: Amazon is acquiring Apple satellite provider Globalstar and has worked out a deal to take over Apple's stake, per an FCC filing.

sources.title: Amazon will acquire Apple's 20% stake in satellite firm Globalstar
sources.snippet: Following the ~$11.6B Globalstar deal announced in April, Amazon will acquire Apple's 20% stake.

sources.title: Amazon is Considering a $9 Billion Deal to Acquire Satellite Communications Company Globalstar
sources.snippet: Early reporting of Amazon–Globalstar talks (~$9B); Apple holds ~20% stake and controls 85% of Globalstar network capacity.

sources.title: Wiz's Founders And Investors Cash Out As Google's $32 Billion Takeover Closes
sources.snippet: Google closed its $32 billion all-cash acquisition of Wiz on March 11, 2026, the largest purchase in the company's history.

sources.title: Google's $32 billion deal for Wiz clears DOJ antitrust review
sources.snippet: Wiz cleared a U.S. DOJ antitrust review of its ~$32 billion acquisition by Alphabet.

sources.title: The Nvidia Acquisition Rumor Shouldn't Be Ignored
sources.snippet: SemiAccurate reported Nvidia negotiating to buy a large PC company (Dell/HP); Nvidia denied: 'The media report is false.'

sources.title: China blocks Meta's $2 billion takeover of AI startup Manus
sources.snippet: China's NDRC on April 27, 2026 called for Meta to unwind its $2 billion acquisition of Manus.

sources.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
sources.snippet: Meta acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence (ARI) for an undisclosed sum.

sources.title: Alphabet Lands $10 Billion Meta Cloud Deal
sources.snippet: Meta–Google Cloud ~$10B commercial deal (not an acquisition).

sources.title: Upcoming M&A Deals: Mergers and Acquisitions Tracker
sources.snippet: Pending 2026-2027 deals: Netflix–Warner Bros. Discovery ($83B), PIF/Silver Lake–EA ($55B), Charter–Cox ($34.5B).

sources.title: 20 Biggest Tech Acquisitions: $14B to $71B (2026 Updated)
sources.snippet: Lists Google-Wiz ($32B, closed March 2026), Palo Alto-CyberArk ($25B, Feb 2026), SpaceX-Anysphere ($60B, June 2026).

sources.title: Big Tech's 2026 AI Capex Will Hit $725B, up 77% Year-Over-Year
sources.snippet: Big Four hyperscalers to spend ~$725B on capex in 2026; Amazon ~$200B, Microsoft ~$190B, Alphabet $175-185B, Meta $115-135B.
